Add section descriptions under Placement Overview and Our Recruiters

Match Our Recruiters heading style to other section titles

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Eliminate all scroller wobble - full GPU isolation

- Cache scrollWidth once after images load (no per-frame reflow)
- Remove ALL hover transitions/transforms from scroll items
- Add CSS contain:layout style paint + isolation:isolate
- Remove AOS animations from scroll containers (prevents interference)
- pointer-events:none on scroll images (no hover repaints)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: SQLite schema and CRUD layer (#4)

* feat: SQLite schema and CRUD layer

- Add src/db.py with 5-table schema (ads, segments, transcripts,
  voice_embeddings, llm_analyses) using WAL + FK pragmas
- TypedDicts for all row types; AdStatus Literal for status enum
- CRUD helpers: insert_ad, update_ad_status, get_ads_by_status,
  insert_segments, get_segments, upsert_transcript, get_transcript,
  upsert_voice_embedding, get_voice_embeddings, upsert_llm_analysis,
  get_llm_analysis
- Add tests/test_db.py: 24 tests covering init idempotency, all CRUD
  paths, upsert semantics, and FK cascade deletes
- Adjust pyproject.toml: PLR0913/PLR2004 ignores, reportAny=false,
  reportImplicitStringConcatenation=false

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address PR review comments

- Scope PLR0913 to src/db.py per-file-ignores (was global)
- Replace implicit SQL string concat with triple-quoted string in
  insert_segments; re-enable reportImplicitStringConcatenation
- Improve reportAny comment explaining per-file scoping limitation
- Add llm_analyses upsert + cascade assert to test_delete_ad_cascades

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: configure local branch tracking for new worktrees (#27)

When creating new branches or worktrees, Copilot agents should configure the local
branch to track origin/BRANCH_NAME via git config without pushing. This makes a plain
git push create the remote branch for the repo owner when desired. Do NOT push.

Co-authored-by: GitHub Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix mobile navbar - smaller logo, compact padding, cleaner look

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement Phase B — Operator Evolution System

Add versioned operator tracking with evaluation, selection, and trial running:

- operator_registry.py: VersionedOperatorRegistry with family/version tracking
- operator_evaluator.py: Composite scoring from metrics (success, confidence, runtime, stability)
- operator_selector.py: Best-version selection with threshold-based promotion
- operator_trial_runner.py: Benchmark trial execution for candidate operators
- Extend RunRecord with operator_family, operator_version, artifact_valid,
  postcondition_passed, downstream_outcome fields
- Extend VerifiedExecutor.execute() to accept operator_family/operator_version
- Extend MutationType enum with THRESHOLD_TUNING, TEMPLATE_SELECTION, RANKING_WEIGHT
- Add corresponding bounded mutation methods to OperatorMutator
- Add comprehensive tests for registry, evaluator, and selector

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add comprehensive WORKFLOW.md architecture & workflow guide

Documents the full project architecture with:
- High-level system diagram and directory structure
- Startup flow from bootstrap to route mounting
- Preset system: 5 presets with model/temp/tool mapping
- Agent loop: iterative tool-calling with OpenRouter
- All 8 tools with actions, params, and safety measures
- Complete API endpoint reference (7 route modules)
- Data layer: PostgreSQL, Redis, Pinecone, 5 DB connectors
- Security model: JWT, AES-256-GCM encryption, rate limiting
- 4 detailed request walkthrough examples with diagrams
- Environment variable reference
- Setup and testing instructions

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: implement Phase A — Temporal Knowledge Base

Add temporal tracking infrastructure for the knowledge graph:

- Add 5 temporal node types (BELIEF_STATE, FINDING_VERSION, etc.)
- Add 6 temporal edge types (SUPERSEDES, REVISES, etc.)
- Create version_tracker.py: revision tracking for entities
- Create belief_timeline.py: time-ordered confidence views
- Create state_snapshot.py: point-in-time graph captures
- Create temporal_graph.py: temporal nodes/edges integration
- Patch belief_update.py: create revisions on confidence updates
  while maintaining backward compatibility
- Add 24 tests covering all new functionality

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add graph workflows and deterministic sync

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Operationalize protected strict sign-off as required MVP release evidence (#531)

* Initial plan

* feat: operationalize protected strict sign-off as required MVP release evidence

- Add WorkflowGovernanceEnabled check to ProtectedSignOffEnvironmentService
  - Validates WorkflowGovernanceConfig:Enabled is true (default)
  - Returns DegradedFail when governance is explicitly disabled
  - Reports policy version in check detail
  - Fail-closed: missing config key treated as enabled (safe default)

- Add WorkflowGovernanceConfig and ProtectedSignOff sections to appsettings.json
  - WorkflowGovernanceConfig enabled by default with all enforcement flags
  - ProtectedSignOff section with default values documented

- Create ProtectedSignOffWorkflowGovernanceTests.cs (16 new tests)
  - Tests governance check pass/fail/absent scenarios
  - Tests DegradedFail when disabled does not raise CriticalFailCount
  - Tests determinism across 3 runs
  - Tests case-insensitive enabled value matching
  - Tests policy version in check detail

- Create .github/workflows/protected-sign-off.yml
  - Fail-closed prerequisites validation (fails with actionable diagnostics when secrets missing)
  - Protected-sign-off GitHub environment support with approval gate
  - Builds and runs governance-backed protected sign-off tests
  - Starts backend with real secrets and calls 4 protected sign-off endpoints
  - Saves evidence artifacts (JSON) retained 90 days
  - Product-owner-quality GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY with per-check results
  - Hard lifecycle pass enforcement as release gate
  - Dry-run mode for prerequisite validation without endpoint calls

- Update PROTECTED_SIGN_OFF_RUNBOOK.md
  - Document GitHub Actions secrets and setup
  - Add workflow section with jobs, artifacts, and release gate semantics
  - Update test count to 70 (54 + 16 new governance tests)
  - Add governance check failure mode to remediation table

Co-authored-by: ludovit-scholtz <256357527+ludovit-scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address code review comments - improve workflow error messaging and XML documentation

Co-authored-by: ludovit-scholtz <256357527+ludovit-scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address product owner gaps in protected sign-off workflow and evidence integrity

Gap 1 fixed: Remove separate validate-prerequisites job that ran outside the
protected-sign-off environment boundary. Merge into single protected-sign-off-run
job with environment: protected-sign-off so both repository-level and
environment-level secrets are accessible from the first step. Reviewer-gated
environment approval now fires before any secret is consumed.

Gap 2 fixed: Remove hardcoded WorkflowGovernanceConfig__Enabled, EnforceValidation,
EnforcePreconditions, EnforcePostCommitVerification, PolicyVersion env var injections
from workflow test and backend steps. Backend now uses its own appsettings.json
defaults. Evidence manifest now extracts observedGovernanceCheckOutcome directly from
the environment check API response (not hardcoded true). Summary table shows observed
governance status from the API, not a workflow-authored claim.

Add ProtectedSignOffEvidenceIntegrityTests.cs (12 integration tests):
- EI1: Governance enabled → HTTP response contains WorkflowGovernanceEnabled=Pass
- EI2: Governance disabled → HTTP response contains WorkflowGovernanceEnabled=DegradedFail
- EI3: Governance disabled → isReadyForProtectedRun=false (cannot overstate readiness)
- EI4: Governance disabled → status=Degraded (not Ready)
- EI5: Governance disabled → DegradedFailCount >= 1
- EI6: Governance enabled → governance check does not introduce degradation
- EI7: TotalCheckCount always matches Checks list length
- EI8: Missing governance key defaults to Pass (safe default)
- EI9: Governance outcome observable in raw API response body
- EI10: DegradedFail does not raise CriticalFailCount
- EI11: Both config checks present when IncludeConfigCheck=true
- EI12: Different runtime configs produce different observed outcomes

Update PROTECTED_SIGN_OFF_RUNBOOK.md: document single-job design rationale,
observed-vs-asserted governance evidence, updated secret setup instructions,
updated test count (54+16+12=82).

Co-authored-by: ludovit-scholtz <256357527+ludovit-scholtz@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: address code review minor issues - error logging, email domain, alphanumeric key padding

commit.message:
feat: Build comprehensive AuraFit Gym Management System backend

- Multi-tenant SaaS architecture with gym_id isolation on every model
- Role-based JWT auth: super_admin, gym_owner, manager, receptionist, trainer, member
- 13 Sequelize models with full associations (SQLite via sequelize)
- Member auto-codes (KSMM0001), Trainer auto-codes (KSMT001)
- Hybrid attendance: QR scan, Daily OTP, Manual entry
- Gamification: XP (+10/check-in), streaks, badges, leaderboard
- Finance: payments, expenses, summary reports
- Equipment: inventory + maintenance log
- Analytics: attendance peaks, member retention, revenue trends, trainer stats
- Rate limiting on all routes (express-rate-limit)
- Super admin auto-seeded from SUPER_ADMIN_PASSWORD env var
- JWT_SECRET required from environment (no insecure fallback)
- Default member passwords documented as temporary, must be changed on first login

Expand dataset to 100 Renaissance artworks

- Artists: Leonardo, Michelangelo, Raphael, Botticelli, Titian, Dürer,
  Donatello, Holbein, Veronese, Caravaggio, Giorgione, Piero della
  Francesca, Filippo Lippi, Perugino, Correggio, Bellini, van Eyck,
  Mantegna

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix tvOS: split device/simulator native builds to match iOS pattern (#3561)

* Fix tvOS: split device/simulator native builds to match iOS pattern

The tvOS native build was combining device and simulator binaries into a
single fat framework at output/native/tvos/, while the NuGet packaging
only included runtimes/tvos/native/ — missing runtimes/tvossimulator/.
This caused linker errors when building for tvOS simulator.

Changes:
- native/tvos/build.cake: Split output into tvos/ and tvossimulator/
  directories, add ios_use_simulator flag, pass SKIA_PLATFORM property
- SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.tvOS.csproj: Add tvossimulator PackageFile
- HarfBuzzSharp.NativeAssets.tvOS.csproj: Add tvossimulator PackageFile

This mirrors the proven iOS build pattern that already correctly splits
device (ios/) and simulator (iossimulator/) native assets.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix tvOS GnNinja to use min_tvos_version instead of min_ios_version

The tvOS build was incorrectly passing min_ios_version to GnNinja, which set
the iOS deployment target but left the tvOS deployment target at Skia's default
of 9.0. This changes it to min_tvos_version so the -mtvos-version-min flag is
set correctly to 11.0.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix(openclaw): harden secret handling and add pre-deploy validation

Add no_log to env file template task, assert required secrets before
deploy, fix Jinja2 undefined-variable guards, add openclaw.yml to CLI
config validation, and surface secret requirements in deploy summary.

Document env file deployment with 0600 permissions and EnvironmentFile
pattern for OpenClaw. Note baikal.yaml restricted to 0640.

* fix(openclaw): use default filter in secret assertion to avoid UndefinedError

Ansible assert evaluates each condition independently so a separate
is defined check does not guard the length filter on the next line.

Add paper ingestion pipeline and multi-agent role modules

- research_lab/ingestion/: arxiv_scraper, pdf_parser, claim_pipeline, paper_queue
- research_lab/agents/roles/: reader, theory, experiment, critic, planner agents

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Clean up: remove unused API services and dead code

- Delete aic_api_service.dart, met_api_service.dart, rijks_api_service.dart, mock_artwork_service.dart
- Simplify ApiSource enum to {localAsset, firestore}
- Remove unused factory constructors (fromAicApi, fromRijksApi, fromMetApi) and helpers
- Remove unused provider definitions and imports
- Remove useMockData toggle and mock data branch in search
- Remove AIC/Rijks/Met API constants
- 0 analyzer issues, -1254 lines of dead code

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add core/artifacts, core/execution, belief, reasoning, and query modules

- core/artifacts: ArtifactType enum, Artifact dataclass, ArtifactStore,
  ArtifactIndexer, and SideEffectProcessor
- core/execution: ExecutionNode, TaskGraph DAG, DependencyResolver
  (topological sort), and Scheduler
- knowledge/belief: BeliefGraph layer over GraphStore, BeliefUpdater
  for confidence recalculation
- knowledge/reasoning: ReasoningStep/ReasoningGraph for inference chains,
  ReasoningRule/ReasoningRuleRegistry
- knowledge/query: GraphQueries for conflict/hypothesis queries,
  GraphTraversal with BFS/DFS/path-finding

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix audio playback, mini player layout, and add mini player toggle setting

- Guard setActiveForLockScreen/updateLockScreenMetadata/clearLockScreenControls
  with existence checks so playback works in Expo Go and dev builds that
  don't yet have the native lock screen module linked
- Remove fixed height:110 from tab bar (was causing ~50px empty gap at bottom)
  and reduce paddingVertical so the tab bar is compact
- Add useSafeAreaInsets to MiniPlayer so it sits above the phone's native
  navigation bar instead of being hidden behind it
- Add miniPlayerEnabled toggle to AudioContext (persisted in AsyncStorage)
- Add 'Show mini player' toggle to Settings screen

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Add Phase 6 sync regression tests

Add dedicated Phase 6 test coverage for deterministic sync export, export freshness checks, dry-run import behavior, and export/import round-trip workflows. Keep the tests scoped to tests/ and skip cleanly with a Phase 6-specific message while sync commands still return placeholder envelopes from e6-sync-code.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
